text_block_list.text:
Hearing Matikanetannhauser's<n>voice, I head to
the training track...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
How was my run just now? My<n>uniqueness
shined through, right?<n>Right?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Appearance: bizarre. Chances of<n>being reported
for suspicious activity:<n>high. Conclusion:
subject's running<n>form exceeds reasonable
parameters<n>of "uniqueness."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, you know... You might end up<n>falling over if
you keep wriggling<n>around when you run...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello! So, um, the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to try running in a unique<n>way so I can
get a bunch of fans!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I was just asking<n>these two for
some advice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I think that... just running normally is<n>probably
better...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. I detect no correlation<n>between
"uniqueness" and successful<n>race performance.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: W-well, just keep watching. I'm suremy next attempt will really be theone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Crabby-crabby!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So? How'd you like my sideways<n>running?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analyzing situation. Implementation in<n>race will
result in immediate<n>disqualification.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what if I close my eyes? I'll just<n>try...
running like this and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Nope! No, no, no! Too scary!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-and dangerous too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Okay, how about I try... running while<n>reading a
book?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Running or walking while distracted is<n>also
prohibited at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... W-wait...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There's just no way this is gonna<n>work, is
there?! How am I supposed<n>to win with such
ridiculous running<n>styles?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Racing is insanely tough!Everyone's trying so hard to be thebest!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Judging from your faces... you all<n>figured that out
already. You unique<n>Umamusume really are on a
different<n>level. Urghhh...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Negative. Uniqueness has no bearing<n>on the
realization in question.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm not sure if Tannhauser is<n>listening to what
we're saying...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um... as a professional trainer, can<n>you think of
any other running styles<n>that might leave an
impression on<n>people?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: If you can, please share!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. Coming in first place<n>leaves a lasting
impression, resulting<n>in high memorability.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I think so too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I see. Now that you mention it, that<n>does make
sense, doesn't it?<n>Everyone remembers the
winner...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And that means they'll support me...<n>And I might
even make them happy?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Checking schedule and current<n>training regimen...
Availability<n>confirmed. Perhaps I could do some<n>
partner running with you?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm available too, but um... I just hope<n>nothing
bad happens.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Of course it won't! Aw, thanks so<n>much,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You guys are right... If I focus too hard<n>on being
unique, I won't be able to run<n>properly!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So I'm gonna focus on winning! I'lltake first like BLAM! Let's dosome partner running together!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa... They're so fast! Wow...<n>Seriously...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I better work extra hard! I'm<n>gonna give it
my all and make it to<n>their level...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Then I'm gonna win! I know I can<n>do it!

More determined than ever,<n>Matikanetannhauser
and her friends<n>keep running right up until
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yep... If you come first, you'll leave<n>an
impression without having to do<n>any weird runs.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: W-weird?! Weird... I guess you're<n>right.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. My calculations also<n>suggest that
your crab walk will only<n>induce disdain in the
audience.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Urk! Okay, okay. Maybe I went a little<n>too far...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: On the other hand, my analysisindicates that your tenacity isyour charm, Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I agree. I think that charm catches<n>people's
attention.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was stopping to stare at<n>you just now,
Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Really?!

I look around to see multiple<n>Umamusume staring
at<n>Matikanetannhauser with curious<n>
expressions.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No, this isn't what I wanted! Aaagh!<n>This is the
wrong kind of attention!

Matikanetannhauser slumps down on<n>the spot,
exasperated and extremely<n>embarrassed.
